name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement
description: A standard mutual NDA created by a committee of over 40 attorneys representing technology vendors, procurement teams, boutique firms, and Big Law. Suitable for protecting confidential information shared between two parties.

name: Cloud Service Agreement
description: Standard agreement for selling and buying cloud software and SaaS products. Created by a committee of over 40 attorneys. Includes terms for subscription, support, and data handling.

name: Design Partner Agreement
description: Standard agreement for design partner relationships, enabling companies to engage early customers or partners in product development and feedback. Created by a committee of over 40 attorneys.

name: Service Level Agreement
description: Standard service level agreement defining uptime commitments, performance metrics, and remedies. Designed to be used alongside the Common Paper Cloud Service Agreement (CSA).

name: Professional Services Agreement
description: Standard agreement for professional services engagements, covering deliverables, timelines, payment, and intellectual property. Created by a committee of over 40 attorneys.

name: Data Processing Agreement
description: Standard data processing agreement for GDPR and privacy law compliance, governing how a service provider processes personal data on behalf of a controller. Created by a committee of over 40 attorneys.

name: Software License Agreement
description: Standard agreement for licensing software to customers, covering license scope, restrictions, fees, and support. Created by a committee of over 40 attorneys.

name: Partnership Agreement
description: Standard agreement for business partnerships, covering roles, responsibilities, revenue sharing, and intellectual property. Created by a committee of over 40 attorneys.

name: Pilot Agreement
description: Short-term agreement for product or service trials and evaluations, allowing prospective customers to test before committing to a full commercial agreement such as a CSA or Software License Agreement.

name: Business Associate Agreement
description: Standard HIPAA Business Associate Agreement governing how a service provider handles protected health information (PHI) on behalf of a covered entity. Created by a committee of over 40 attorneys.

name: AI Addendum
description: Standard addendum addressing AI-specific terms for use with existing agreements, covering topics such as AI-generated content, model training data, and liability for AI outputs. Created by a committee of over 40 attorneys.
